Curriculum Vitae

First author publications

✎

  • Using angular momentum maps to detect kinematically distinct galactic components
    Irodotou & Thomas 2020
  • Morphological evolution and galactic sizes in the L-Galaxies SA model
    Irodotou; Thomas; Henriques; Sargent; Hislop 2019

Co-authored publications

✎

  • First Light And Reionisation Epoch Simulations (FLARES) II The Photometric Properties of High-Redshift Galaxies
    Vijayan; Lovell; Wilkins; Thomas; Barnes; Irodotou; Kuusisto; Roper 2020
  • First Light And Reionisation Epoch Simulations (FLARES) I Environmental Dependence of High-Redshift Galaxy Evolution
    Lovell; Vijayan; Thomas; Wilkins; Barnes; Irodotou; Roper 2020
